<!-- source-hash: c7721a733b663f115f890b6a3cab1d84 -->
Maps `IntegratedTool` domain objects and related filter/list structures to their external-facing DTO response representations for the OpenFrame API layer.

## Key Components

| Method | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `toToolResponse(IntegratedTool)` | Converts a single `IntegratedTool` document to a `ToolResponse` DTO, including URLs and credentials |
| `toToolsResponse(ToolList)` | Converts a paginated/listed `ToolList` to a `ToolsResponse` DTO; returns empty list on null input |
| `toToolFilterResponse(ToolFilters)` | Maps available filter options (types, categories, platform categories) to `ToolFilterResponse` |
| `toToolUrlResponseList(List<ToolUrl>)` | *(private)* Streams a list of `ToolUrl` documents to `ToolUrlResponse` DTOs |
| `toToolCredentialsResponse(ToolCredentials)` | *(private)* Maps credential fields including nested API key details |
| `toToolApiKeyResponse(ToolApiKey)` | *(private)* Converts `ToolApiKey` to `ToolApiKeyResponse`, safely resolving enum types to strings |

## Usage Example

```java
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/tools")
public class ToolController {

    private final ToolMapper toolMapper;
    private final ToolService toolService;

    @GetMapping("/{id}")
    public ToolResponse getTool(@PathVariable String id) {
        IntegratedTool tool = toolService.findById(id);
        return toolMapper.toToolResponse(tool);
    }

    @GetMapping
    public ToolsResponse listTools() {
        ToolList toolList = toolService.listTools();
        return toolMapper.toToolsResponse(toolList);
    }

    @GetMapping("/filters")
    public ToolFilterResponse getFilters() {
        ToolFilters filters = toolService.getAvailableFilters();
        return toolMapper.toToolFilterResponse(filters);
    }
}
```

> All mapping methods handle `null` inputs gracefully — returning `null` for single-object mappings or empty collections for list/filter mappings — preventing `NullPointerException` propagation to API consumers.
